title: Voice input — reliable microphone handling on mobile
feedback: Microphone permission denied even though allowed in settings — opened from WhatsApp instead of the live site.

title: Full exercise voice logging — speak to log, auto-fill from history
feedback: Tapping through five fields per exercise while still in the gym breaks the flow.

title: Voice input for Sets, Reps, and Weight — speak numbers directly
feedback: Typing numbers between heavy sets with sweaty hands is friction that should not exist.

title: Estimated 1-Rep Max tracker — Epley formula across your full history
feedback: Serious lifters were already calculating this manually.

title: Training Fingerprint — your personal training DNA
feedback: Users wanted to see their actual training patterns, not just totals.

title: Rotation bug fixed — phone orientation no longer breaks layout
feedback: Rotating portrait to landscape and back required a page refresh.

title: Mobile exercise layout — card view with no horizontal scrolling
feedback: On mobile, scrolling left to right to add weights and reps was not intuitive.

title: Progressive Overload Signal — per-exercise weight comparison
feedback: Users wanted to know at a glance whether they were progressing.

title: Muscle Balance Ratio — Push:Pull and Quad:Hamstring over 28 days
feedback: Serious lifters wanted a structural view of their volume balance.

title: Feedback now routes via Web3Forms — direct email reply to users
feedback: Previous feedback mechanism had no reliable notification path.

title: Smoother rest timer audio — gentle start, explosive final 10 seconds
feedback: The start beep was reported as jarring.

title: Rest timer pause button
feedback: Mid-rest interruptions had no recovery path.
